title: The Upturned - Fat Pajama Man
description: Adds the Fat Pajama Man from The Upturned as a rare minboss
body:
Adds The Fat Pajama Man from The Upturned to the game as a miniboss who spawns rarely after six nights of sleep, or much more commonly, and after two nights, if you have bad omen active.

He drops the Pajama Suit, which gives buffs when slept with equipped, Regeneration and Saturation depending on the armor pieces equipped.
